zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucas Poynings於1323年出生在英國素可波尼斯時，他的父親Thomas de Poynings30歲，母親Agnes Rokesley24歲。他於1348年11月10日與Isabelle Porter在英國哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1376年6月5日在英國哈普爾巴辛斯托可享年53歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾維古姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucas Poynings于1323年出生在英国素可波尼斯时，他的父亲Thomas de Poynings30岁，母亲Agnes Rokesley24岁。他于1348年11月10日与Isabelle Porter在英国哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1376年6月5日在英国哈普爾巴辛斯托可享年53岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾維古姆。

nameMeanings.name: Lucas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In part a learned form of Luke , in part a transferred use of the surname derived from it in the Middle Ages. The Latin form Lucas was often used in the Middle Ages in written documents in place of the spoken vernacular form Luke, hence the common surname. It is also the spelling preferred in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, which has had some influence on its selection as a given name. There has been a sharp rise in its popularity since the turn of the century. Lucas is now also used as an Anglicized form of various Eastern European equivalents ( see the cognates listed at Luke ).

variants.name: Luke
meanings: Middle English vernacular form of Lucas , Latin form of the post-classical Greek name Loukas ‘man from Lucania’. This owes its perennial popularity throughout Christian Europe to the fact that, from the 2nd century onwards, the third gospel in the New Testament has been ascribed to the Lucas or Luke mentioned at various places in Acts and in the Epistles. Little is known about him beyond the facts that he was a doctor, a Gentile, and a friend and convert of St Paul. The name was borne by the character Luke Skywalker in the film Star Wars ( 1977 ), and rose sharply in popularity in the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucas Poynings was born in 1323, in Poynings, Sussex, England, his father, Thomas de Poynings, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Rokesley, was 24. He married Isabelle Porter on 10 November 1348, in Old Basing, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 5 June 1376, in Basingstoke, Hampshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Winchester, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucas Poynings est né en 1323, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Poynings, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Rokesley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle Porter le 10 novembre 1348, à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1376, à Basingstoke, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucas Poynings 1323 in Poynings, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Poynings 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Rokesley 24. Er hat am 10. November 1348 in Old Basing, Hampshire, England Isabelle Porter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. Juni 1376 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Basingstoke, Hampshire, England und wurde in Winchester, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucas Poynings è nato il nel 1323 nel Poynings, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Poynings, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Rokesley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle Porter il 10 novembre 1348, nel Old Basing, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 giugno 1376, nel Basingstoke, Hampshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Winchester, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucas Poyningsが1323年にイギリススセックスポイニングズで生まれた時，父Thomas de Poyningsは30歳，母Agnes Rokesleyは24歳であった。1348年11月10日にイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングでIsabelle Porterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1376年6月5日にイギリスハンプシュアイアバシングストクで53歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucas Poynings(이)가 1323년 영국 수세스 포이닝스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Poynings(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Rokesley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1348년 11월 10일 영국 함프실르 드 바징에서 Isabelle Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1376년 6월 5일 영국 함프실르 바징스토크에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucas Poynings nasceu em 1323, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Poynings, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Rokesley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle Porter em 10 de novembro de 1348, em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1376, em Basingstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucas Poynings родился в 1323 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Poynings было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Rokesley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle Porter 10 ноября 1348 г. в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 5 июня 1376 г. в местности басингсток, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucas Poynings nació en 1323, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Poynings, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes Rokesley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabelle Porter el 10 de noviembre de 1348, en Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de junio de 1376, en Basingstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
